code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut stopped = false
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if not is_end
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if (is_end or is_ws) and not stopped
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let parsed = string.parse_int(cur)
        match parsed
        when Some(v)
          if v < 0
            stopped = true
          else
            total = total + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else if not stopped
      let b2 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("partial=#{total}")
end
